rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, ensuring alignment with Luecken et al.'s findings.
rationale.R1.6: The agent improved several problem paragraphs but didn't perform a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly disclosed uncertainties and provided sources for verification.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors were introduced, and potential harms were identified in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While some changes were traced, not all minor edits were annotated with sources.
